Order Custom Signicade A-Frame Signs for Professional Business Display

The White Signicade Deluxe A-Frame Kit includes durable hardware and (2) 36" x 24" full color custom signs designed for professional outdoor advertising. Perfect for business storefronts, construction sites, and promotional displays, this weather-resistant A-frame system delivers maintenance-free performance.

The reinforced plastic A-frame can be filled with water or sand for enhanced stability in outdoor conditions. Built-in molded handles ensure easy transportation and repositioning. Each kit includes two professionally printed signs ready for immediate installation and use.

Custom sizing, double-sided printing, and specialty applications are available through our customer service team to meet your specific business advertising requirements.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Coroplast Material for Outdoor A-Frame Sign Durability

Your Signicade A-Frame kit includes professional-grade hardware and (2) 36" x 24" custom printed signs manufactured from premium materials.

Material Specifications:

4mm Coroplast: Lightweight, waterproof plastic substrate ideal for outdoor A-frame installations. Digitally printed with UV-resistant inks for long-lasting color retention and weather resistance.

This material provides excellent durability for business signage, construction advertising, and promotional displays while maintaining professional appearance in all weather conditions.

Request a free sample packet to evaluate material quality for your A-frame sign project.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

A-Frame Sign Hardware & Installation Features

The Signicade Deluxe A-Frame system includes professional-grade features designed for commercial outdoor use and easy handling.

Hardware Features:

  • Water/Sand Fill Capability: Base chambers can be filled for enhanced stability in windy conditions
  • Molded Transport Handles: Integrated handles for easy repositioning and storage
  • Weather-Resistant Construction: UV-stable plastic withstands outdoor exposure
  • Sign Retention System: Secure mounting keeps signs properly positioned

The white frame finish provides professional appearance suitable for business districts, retail locations, and commercial applications.

Double-sided sign printing and custom frame colors may be available through our customer service team for specialized installations.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom A-Frame Sign Production & Turnaround Times

Choose from flexible production schedules designed to meet your business advertising timeline requirements. Production times range from express to economy options.

Express Production for Urgent A-Frame Sign Orders

2 Business Days Express: Priority production for time-sensitive business advertising needs.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST processed next business day
  • Emergency same-day options available through customer service
  • Production time excludes shipping duration

Standard Production for Custom A-Frame Signs

3 Business Days Standard: Most popular turnaround option with no additional fees.

  • Optimal balance of speed and value
  • Free standard production timing
  • Suitable for most business advertising schedules

Saver Production for Budget A-Frame Sign Projects

5 Business Days Saver: Economy timing option for advance planning and cost savings.

  • Reduced pricing for extended timeline
  • Ideal for non-urgent promotional campaigns
  • Same quality standards as faster options

Production begins upon file approval. Proof requests or prepress issues may extend initial timeline until approval confirmation.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment Options for Custom A-Frame Sign Orders

All Signicade A-Frame orders require payment prior to production to ensure immediate processing of your business signage.

Accepted Payment Methods:

  • Credit Cards: Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover
  • Business Checks: Must be received and cleared before production begins

Credit card charges are processed only after order approval and production confirmation. This ensures accuracy of all specifications before payment processing.

For check payment processing details and business account options, review our check order procedures.

Large volume A-frame orders may qualify for extended payment terms through our customer service team.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for A-Frame Sign Kit Delivery

A-frame sign kits ship via professional carriers with tracking provided for all deliveries. Shipping costs are calculated by package weight and destination.

Shipping Methods Available:

  • Economy: 5-10 business days (cost-effective for advance planning)
  • Standard: 3-5 business days (most popular option)
  • Three Day: 3 business days guaranteed
  • Two Day: 2 business days expedited
  • Overnight: 1 business day express delivery

Important Shipping Notes:

  • Tracking numbers provided upon shipment
  • Large A-frame orders may incur additional shipping charges
  • Damaged items must be returned for replacement processing
  • Lost packages replaced after carrier confirmation (7-10 business days)

International A-Frame Sign Shipping:

International customers must provide shipping labels and customs documentation. USPS and UPS labels accepted for international A-frame deliveries.

Contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 for shipping questions or special delivery requirements.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Business & Commercial Uses for Signicade A-Frame Signs

Signicade A-Frame signs deliver professional advertising solutions for diverse business and commercial applications requiring portable, weather-resistant signage.

Retail & Business Applications:

  • Storefront Advertising: Daily specials, hours, and promotional messaging
  • Restaurant Signage: Menu highlights, lunch specials, and outdoor dining
  • Retail Sales: Clearance events, new arrivals, and seasonal promotions
  • Service Businesses: Professional services, appointments, and contact information

Commercial & Professional Uses:

  • Construction Sites: Safety information, project details, and contact data
  • Real Estate: Open house announcements and property information
  • Event Marketing: Directional signage and event promotion
  • Business Districts: Professional advertising in commercial zones

Installation Advantages:

  • No permanent mounting required
  • Easy daily setup and storage
  • Weather-resistant for year-round use
  • Professional appearance suitable for commercial districts

The portable design allows repositioning for maximum visibility while maintaining professional appearance standards required for business advertising.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

A-Frame Sign Artwork Requirements for Professional Printing

Proper artwork preparation ensures optimal print quality and professional appearance for your custom A-frame signs.

Recommended File Formats:

  • Vector Files: .eps with fonts converted to outlines (best quality)
  • High-Resolution Files: .pdf or .jpg at 300 DPI minimum
  • File Size Limit: 60 MB maximum for online uploads

Artwork Guidelines:

  • Design for 36" x 24" finished size
  • Include appropriate bleed area for trimming
  • Use high-contrast colors for outdoor visibility
  • Consider viewing distance for text sizing

Quality Assurance Options:

  • Order Proofs: Review artwork and order details before production
  • Color Match System: Critical color matching for brand consistency
  • Professional Design: Our graphic designers can create custom artwork

Large File Handling:

Files larger than 60 MB require special handling. Contact customer service for large file submission instructions to ensure fastest processing.

Our prepress team reviews all artwork for print optimization. If files require adjustment, production begins after customer approval of any modifications.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Your Custom A-Frame Sign Kit Today

Get professional business advertising with our complete Signicade A-Frame sign system. Each kit includes durable hardware and two custom 36" x 24" signs printed on weather-resistant Coroplast material.

Why Choose Our A-Frame Sign Kits:

  • Complete System: Hardware and custom signs included
  • Weather Resistant: Built for year-round outdoor use
  • Professional Quality: Commercial-grade materials and printing
  • Easy Transport: Molded handles for convenient repositioning
  • Fast Production: 2-5 business day turnaround options

Perfect For:

  • Business storefronts and retail locations
  • Restaurant daily specials and promotions
  • Construction sites and real estate
  • Professional services and events

Ready to create your custom A-frame signs? Upload your artwork, choose from our professional templates, or work with our design team to create the perfect business advertising solution.

Questions about customization, double-sided printing, or bulk orders? Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 for personalized assistance with your A-frame sign project.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

FAQ - Custom Signicade A-Frame Signs

What's included with the A-Frame sign kit?

Each kit includes the white Signicade Deluxe A-Frame hardware and two custom 36" x 24" signs printed on durable Coroplast material. The frame features molded handles and can be filled with water or sand for stability.

Can I get double-sided printed signs?

Yes, double-sided printing is available. Contact our customer service team to discuss double-sided options and pricing for your A-frame sign project.

What material are the signs printed on?

Signs are printed on 4mm Coroplast, a lightweight, waterproof plastic material that's digitally printed with UV-resistant inks for outdoor durability.

How do I stabilize the A-frame for windy conditions?

The A-frame base can be filled with water or sand through built-in chambers for enhanced stability in windy outdoor conditions.

What file formats do you accept for artwork?

We accept .eps (with fonts outlined), high-resolution .pdf, .jpg, and .tiff files. Vector files print best, and all files should be 300 DPI or higher for optimal quality.

How long does production take?

Choose from 2-day express, 3-day standard (free), or 5-day saver production times. Production begins after artwork approval.

Can I change the frame color from white?

Custom frame colors may be available for special orders. Contact customer service to discuss color options and any additional requirements.

What's the maximum file size I can upload?

Online uploads are limited to 60 MB. For larger files, call customer service for special upload instructions.

Do you offer design services?

Yes, our professional graphic designers can create custom artwork for your A-frame signs. Select the design service option when ordering.

What shipping options are available?

We offer Economy (5-10 days), Standard (3-5 days), Three Day, Two Day, and Overnight shipping. All orders include tracking information.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
